description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, large windows, and a modest front garden with trees and shrubs. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and there is a paved driveway leading to a garage area. The landscaping includes a mix of grass, paved walkways, and decorative plants, giving the home a contemporary suburban feel. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the front and side yards. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, garage area, and extended paved driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional greenery, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the fence, side windows, and more of the garden layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
